items.name: 法華寺・八方睨みの龍の壁画

en.name_romaji: Hokke-ji Happō-nirami no Ryū no Hekiga
en.name_en: Wall Painting of the Dragon that Glares in All Directions at Hokke-ji Temple
en.description_en: A wall painting of a dragon glaring in all directions at Hokke-ji Temple, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 5 December 1971).

en.name_en: Mountain Gate (Sanmon) of Hokke-ji Temple
en.description_en: The sanmon (mountain gate) of Hokke-ji Temple, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 5 December 1971).

en.name_en: Statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitābha) by Enkū
en.description_en: A statue of Amida Nyorai attributed to Enkū (Enkū-butsu), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 17 February 1977).

en.name_en: Statue of Raigō Kannon by Enkū
en.description_en: A statue of Raigō Kannon attributed to Enkū (Enkū-butsu), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 17 February 1977).

en.name_en: Statue of Raigō Kannon by Enkū
en.description_en: A statue of Raigō Kannon attributed to Enkū (Enkū-butsu), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 17 February 1977).

en.name_en: Haiku Monument of Arai-an
en.description_en: A haiku inscription monument (kuhi) associated with Arai-an, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 17 February 1977).

en.name_en: Villa of the Sekikawa Family
en.description_en: The villa of the Sekikawa family, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 14 July 1981).

items.name: 金丸家住宅　母屋及び土蔵

en.name_en: Kanemaru Family Residence: Main House and Storehouse
en.description_en: The main house (omoya) and earthen storehouse (dozō) of the Kanemaru family residence, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 22 July 1982).

items.name: 子安地蔵菩薩像（木喰仏）

en.name_en: Statue of Koyasu Jizō Bosatsu by Mokujiki
en.description_en: A statue of Koyasu Jizō Bosatsu attributed to Mokujiki (Mokujiki-butsu), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 27 October 1987).

en.name_en: Statue of Jizō Bosatsu by Mokujiki
en.description_en: A statue of Jizō Bosatsu attributed to Mokujiki (Mokujiki-butsu), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 27 October 1987).

en.name_en: Framed Tablet of the Eight Views of Esashi
en.description_en: A framed tablet (gaku) depicting the eight scenic views of Esashi, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 27 October 1987).

en.name_en: Framed Tablet Inscribed "Ryūmin-den"
en.description_en: A framed tablet (gaku) inscribed "Ryūmin-den," classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 27 October 1987).

en.name_en: Commemorative Monument to Matsuzawa Ihachi
en.description_en: A commemorative monument to the elder Matsuzawa Ihachi, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 26 November 1991).

en.name_en: Commemorative Monument of the Ship Tamae-maru
en.description_en: A commemorative monument relating to the vessel Tamae-maru, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 26 November 1991).

en.name_en: Grave of Master Oyama Tetsuzō
en.description_en: The grave of Oyama Tetsuzō, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 26 November 1991).

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Kaiyō-maru
en.description_en: Artifacts excavated relating to the ship Kaiyō-maru, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 26 November 1991).

items.name: 贈従五位鈴鹿甚右衛門之碑

en.name_romaji: Zō Jugoi Suzuka Jin'emon no Hi
en.name_en: Monument to Suzuka Jin'emon, Posthumously Awarded Junior Fifth Rank
en.description_en: A monument to Suzuka Jin'emon, posthumously granted the Junior Fifth Rank, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 26 November 1991).

en.name_en: Ship Votive Plaques (Two Pieces)
en.description_en: Two votive plaques depicting ships (funa-ema), classified as a tangible folk cultural property. They are town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 14 July 1981).

en.name_en: Ship Votive Plaque
en.description_en: A votive plaque depicting a ship (funa-ema), classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 27 October 1987).

items.name: 祭礼山車蛭子山水引猩々緋水引

en.name_romaji: Sairei Dashi Ebisu-yama Mizuhiki Shōjōhi Mizuhiki
en.name_en: Festival Float Ebisu-yama Hangings and Scarlet Shōjō-hi Hangings
en.description_en: The mizuhiki (decorative hangings) of the Ebisu-yama festival float, including the scarlet (shōjō-hi) hangings, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. They are town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 19 April 1999).

items.name: 祭礼山車蛭子山人形御面相及び付属品
items.description: 人形御面相及び付属品

en.name_romaji: Sairei Dashi Ebisuyama Ningyō Omensō Oyobi Fuzokuhin
en.name_en: Face and Accessories of the Ebisuyama Festival Float Figure
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of the figure's face and accessories of the Ebisuyama festival float. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1999-04-19.

items.name: 祭礼山車豊年山水引唐子春秋之図

en.name_romaji: Sairei Dashi Hōnenyama Mizuhiki Karako Shunjū no Zu
en.name_en: Chinese Children in Spring and Autumn Hanging on the Honenyama Festival Float
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of the decorative hanging depicting Chinese children in spring and autumn scenes on the Honenyama festival float. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1999-04-19.

items.name: 祭礼山車豊年山水引日本三景之図

en.name_romaji: Sairei Dashi Hōnenyama Mizuhiki Nihon Sankei no Zu
en.name_en: Three Views of Japan Hanging on the Honenyama Festival Float
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of the decorative hanging depicting the Three Views of Japan on the Honenyama festival float. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1999-04-19.

items.name: 祭礼山車聖武山人形御面相及び付属品
items.description: 人形御面相及び付属品

en.name_romaji: Sairei Dashi Shōmuyama Ningyō Omensō Oyobi Fuzokuhin
en.name_en: Face and Accessories of the Shomuyama Festival Float Figure
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of the figure's face and accessories of the Shomuyama festival float. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1999-04-19.

en.name_en: Esashi Doba Deer Dance
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Esashi Doba deer dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1973-02-05.

en.name_en: Esashi Tazawa Deer Dance
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Esashi Tazawa deer dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1973-02-05.

en.name_en: Esashi Deer Dance
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Esashi deer dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1973-02-05.

en.name_en: Esashi Shark Dance
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Esashi shark dance (same odori). It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1991-11-26.

en.name_en: Esashi Oiwake Dance
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Esashi Oiwake dance. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1995-06-13.

items.name: 戊辰の役戦死者の墳墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_romaji: Boshin no Eki Senshisha no Funbo
en.name_en: Graves of Those Killed in the Boshin War
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the graves of those killed in the Boshin War. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1971-12-05.

items.name: かもめ島砲台跡　2ケ所
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Two Kamomejima Battery Sites
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of two battery sites on Kamomejima Island. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1981-07-14.

items.name: 北前係船柱及び同跡（かもめ島周辺）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Kitamae Ship Mooring Posts and Their Sites (Kamomejima Vicinity)
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the mooring posts used by kitamae ships and their sites. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1982-07-22, located in the vicinity of Kamomejima Island.

items.name: 北前船飲用井戸
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Drinking-Water Well for Kitamae Ships
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of a drinking-water well used by kitamae ships. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1982-07-22.
